title: Post-Office
shortDescription: Fast-paced arcade brick breaker with physics-driven power-ups. (Demo project — replace with your own.)
description:
This is a DEMO project entry showing every supported field. Replace this file with a real project, or delete it and remove its slug from projects/index.json.
The description supports multiple paragraphs — separate them with a newline (\n) in the JSON string.
All fields except "title" are optional: if you omit "video", the video section simply doesn't render, and the same goes for "screenshots", "links", "tags" and the rest.
